title: chazah #2372
definition:
1) to see, perceive, look, behold, prophesy, provide
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to see, behold
        1a2) to see as a seer in the ecstatic state
        1a3) to see, perceive
             1a3a) with the intelligence
             1a3b) to see (by experience)
             1a3c) to provide
nasbUsage:

        1a1) to see, behold
        1a2) to see as a seer in the ecstatic state
        1a3) to see, perceive
             1a3a) with the intelligence
             1a3b) to see (by experience)
             1a3c) to provide

    NASB:  see, behold
